[[Athakam Medtech/Legends|Athakam Medtech's]] '''Med Unit''' was a mobile medbed that employed a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] engine; patients were often pushed to [[Medcenter/Legends|hospitals]] on such units.

The unit was capable of diagnosis and treatment of its patient. It analyzed the patient and displayed any information it found on a screen. It would then begin treatment with its robotic arms and internal supply of medical materials.

The Med Unit came with enough supplies for ten treatments. It could be restocked by using [[FastFlesh medpac/Legends|FastFlesh medpacs]].
